violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Inspector provided RIDOH guidance. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Hand washing sinks are lacking proper signage. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
Cases of soda were observed stored on the floor in the dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
A clean cutting board was observed stored behind the faucet of the hand washing sink in the back room. Cutting board was moved to 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 05/05/2025
Debris was observed under shelving in dry storage area. New Violation. Correct By: 05/19/2025
